final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for RAN QIU brand, a warm autumn-themed promotional asset with Eastern aesthetics.

Style/medium: Eastern minimalist aesthetic, poetic natural imagery, editorial poster design with Japanese wabi-sabi influence
Composition: generous negative space, shallow depth of field, centered brand mark with breathing room
Subject: RAN QIU brand identity mark integrated with autumn natural elements (fallen leaves, dried grass, warm earth tones)
Scene/backdrop: golden hour autumn landscape, soft blurred natural background suggesting harvest season
Lighting/mood: golden hour warm light, soft diffused illumination, serene and contemplative atmosphere
Color palette: deep autumn brown-red (#8B3A1E) as anchor, beige (#E8DCCB) as base, golden-brown (#D4A574) as accent, warm harmonious relationships
Materials/textures: natural paper grain, matte organic surfaces, subtle leaf textures
Text (verbatim): "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must maintain ample white space; brand colors must dominate; Eastern poetic sensibility must be evident
Avoid: cluttered composition, harsh shadows, cold color casts, generic stock photo aesthetic, over-saturated colors, modern tech visual tropes
